title: gh-127870: Fix ctypes _as_parameter_ handling
author: vstinner
body:
Detect recursive calls in ctypes `_as_parameter_` handling: add `Py_EnterRecursiveCall()` and `Py_LeaveRecursiveCall()` calls.
